name: com.baawolf.prettyhierarchy
description:
Organise large Unity scenes with custom hierarchy icons, coloured separators, and automatic component icons.

Interaction:
• Right-click the left icon area of any GameObject in the Hierarchy to open the Pretty Hierarchy menu (an icon does not need to be present).
• Double-click an icon to open the first attached user script.

Supports custom textures, built-in Unity icons, separator presets, and component-based icon assignment.
author: BaaWolf (https://baawolf.com)
